'''Rorf Willems''' was [[Minister of Defense (Five Worlds)|head]] of the [[Ministry of Defense (Five Worlds)|Ministry of Defense]] for the five worlds of the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]] during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]]. His voice was 'gravelly' and he was said to act like a thug. Along with [[Five World Prime Minister|Prime Minister]] [[Dur Gejjen]] and [[Minister of Intelligence (Five Worlds)|Minister of Intelligence]] [[Gavele Lemora]], he was one of the three most important people of the [[High Cabinet]].

Willems was installed as Minister of Defense sometime in the 11 days between [[Dur Gejjen]]'s rise to the position of [[Five World Prime Minister]] and [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]' meeting with [[Han Solo/Legends|Han]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Solo]] aboard the [[Thrackan Sal-Solo (starship)|''Thrackan Sal-Solo'']] in the [[Kiris Asteroid Cluster]]. When Antilles and Gejjen asked the Solos to meet with [[Hapes/Legends|Hapan]] [[Queen Mother]] [[Tenel Ka Djo]], it was revealed that Willems was to go in their place if they refused.

Willems helped convince the Solos to go on this diplomatic mission, partly through his heated exchange of words with Han and partly by simply being present to see the what a poor replacement he would be if they refused.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]'' {{1st}}
